title: Operator "OR" for automations
excerpt: I have no clue how was this not added yet but we need operator “OR” to be added to plenty of basic automations like for example "When status changes to ‘status 1’ OR ‘status 2’ then do something

posts.author: wejku (Piotr)
posts.cookedHtml: I have no clue how was this not added yet but we need operator “OR” to be added to plenty of basic automations like for example "When status changes to ‘status 1’ OR ‘status 2’ then do something

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @wejku,

I am excited to inform you that OR functions in automations are on our roadmap! You can see this via the existing feature request, here → Adding OR & NOT to the custom automations "Builder".

I’d be happy to go ahead and merge your request into the existing request to consolidate votes
